vulnerability.reason: Auditor over-trust without independent validation is captured, 'sanity checks' parallels functional perturbations as cross-validation.
vulnerability.reference: Auditors over-trust visual saliency maps without cross-validating with functional perturbations.
vulnerability.generated: Auditors rely on feature visualizations as foundational truth without independent validation against natural inputs or sanity checks.

impact.reason: Hidden safety-critical failures leading to deployment/approval of harmful/dangerous models conveys the same affected party and damage type.
impact.reference: Undetected safety-critical behaviors lead to deployment of harmful models.
impact.generated: Safety-critical model failure modes remain hidden, leading to approval of neural networks with dangerous latent behaviors.

dose_response.reason: Causal chain from unreliable visualizations to auditor over-trust without validation, hidden failures, and harmful model deployment is fully present.
dose_response.reference: Unreliable visualizations cause AI safety auditors over-trusting saliency maps without cross-validation, hiding safety-critical failures and leading to deployment of harmful models.
dose_response.generated: Unreliable feature visualizations, when AI safety auditors examine decision processes, trigger reliance on them as truth without validation against natural inputs, leading to hidden safety-critical failures and approval of dangerously latent networks.
